arts.ttl: Atalanta’s Ninth Place Finish in Champions League “Extraordinary”, Says Marino
arts.sum: Atalanta's Director General Umberto Marino expressed his delight with the club's performance in this season's UEFA Champions League, hailing their ninth-place finish as an "extraordinary achievement". Speaking to Sky Sports following the Champions League playoff draw, Marino reflected on the team's impressive campaign and looked ahead to their upcoming playoff tie. arts.ttl: Atalanta’s Scalvini Faces Potential Season-Ending Shoulder Surgery
arts.sum: The Atalanta squad has returned to Bergamo with mixed emotions following their 2-2 draw against Barcelona in the Champions League. While the result didn't secure a direct spot in the top eight, it has undoubtedly boosted the team's morale and reinforced their belief in their abilities. arts.ttl: Serie A | Atalanta v Torino: Match Preview
arts.sum: The Gewiss Stadium in Bergamo is set to host a crucial Serie A encounter this Saturday as Atalanta welcomes Torino in a match that could have significant implications for both teams' seasons. Atalanta, fresh from their European exploits, aim to reignite their domestic title challenge, while Torino look to continue their recent positive form and climb further up the table.
